name: sintonia
description: 15-var weighted matrix + 7 chain bonuses. Grades the GAME.

star_player_status.description: Key player OUT/GTD impact + team record without

road_trip_length.description: Games into road trip / home stand
Games into road trip / home stand

starting_pitcher.description: SP ERA, K/9, WHIP, L5 starts — #1 MLB edge variable

bullpen_state.description: Bullpen IP last 3 days, high-leverage availability, closer status

star_player_status.description: Key batter OUT/GTD impact on lineup — OPS gap

platoon_matchup.description: RHB% vs LHP or LHB% vs RHP — platoon splits advantage

defense_rating.description: Team fielding (DRS, OAA, error rate) — run prevention

recent_form.description: L5/L10 W-L record and run differential trend

weather_impact.description: Wind speed/direction, temp, humidity at game time

lineup_vs_hand.description: Lineup OPS vs SP handedness — L/R matchup advantage

rest_advantage.description: Day game after night, travel, series position

h2h_season.description: Head-to-head this season and SP vs lineup history

ats_trend.description: Run line cover rate L10 + O/U trend

sharp_vs_public.description: Line movement suggesting sharp action on ML/RL

home_away.description: Home/away record split and SP home/away splits

fixture_congestion.description: Matches in 10/14 days, UCL/UEL midweek + weekend — #1 soccer edge

form_league_position.description: League table position gap, L5 form (WWDLW), PPG trend

star_player_status.description: Key player OUT/GTD impact — goals+assists contribution

attack_defense_rating.description: xG for/against, BTTS rate, O2.5 rate — scoring profile

home_away_venue.description: Home/away record split + venue factors (altitude, turf, travel)

european_hangover.description: UCL/UEL away trip within 72hrs of domestic match — rotation/fatigue

recent_form.description: L5 results, goals scored/conceded trend, momentum

h2h_season.description: Head-to-head record, goals in H2H, style matchup

motivation_context.description: Title race / relegation battle / mid-table dead rubber / cup focus

rotation_risk.description: Expected squad rotation due to upcoming fixtures or manager pattern

clean_sheet_rate.description: CS% L10 home/away — defensive solidity for BTTS/O-U

league_context.description: League quality tier + cross-league form adjustment

ats_trend.description: Asian handicap cover rate L10 and line value

sharp_vs_public.description: Line movement / steam moves on match odds or handicap

depth_injuries.description: Squad depth beyond starting XI — bench quality

defensive_efficiency.description: Opponent points per possession / KenPom AdjD

line_movement.description: Open vs current spread delta + direction

public_money_bias.description: Public % on one side + line movement opposite

turnover_margin.description: Turnover margin and forced TO rate

neutral_site.description: Neutral site / true road game adjustment

coaching_matchup.description: Coaching style matchup and ATS history

THE_MISPRICING.description: Star OUT but line hasn't moved + sharps on opposite side

FATIGUE_FADE.description: Well-rested team vs fatigued opponent with depth issues

FORM_WAVE.trigger: recent_form >= 8 AND off_ranking >= 8 AND ats_trend >= 7 AND h2h_season >= 7
FORM_WAVE.description: Hot team with elite offense covering spreads and winning H2H

GOALIE_EDGE.trigger: goalie_confirmed >= 8 AND save_pct_trend >= 7 AND b2b_fatigue >= 7 AND corsi_xg >= 7
GOALIE_EDGE.description: Backup goalie in with declining save% and bad underlying metrics

TRAP_GAME.description: Public hammering favorite but line moving to dog

VALUE_DOG.description: Sharps on dog + no significant injuries on dog side

BLUE_BLOOD_TRAP.description: Public on big name but NET rankings close and line flat

ACE_DOMINATION.description: Elite SP with favorable platoon matchup and rested bullpen — full pitching edge

BULLPEN_MELTDOWN.description: Opponent's bullpen taxed (15+ IP L3d) while our pen is fresh and SP is solid

COORS_OVER.description: High-altitude park + favorable weather (wind out, warm) + high-scoring offenses

CONGESTION_FADE.description: Opponent played UCL/UEL away midweek + heavy congestion + expected rotation

CLASS_GAP.description: 10+ league position gap with form team at home — class difference

FORTRESS_HOME.description: Elite home record + high CS rate + strong league position — fortress venue

INJURY_GOLDMINE.description: Opponent star OUT + line hasn't adjusted + our team in decent form

REST_DOMINATION.description: Massive rest edge + home + opponent traveling

SHARPS_LOVE.description: Sharp money pouring in + line moving our way + solid form

BLOWOUT_INCOMING.description: Elite offense + strong defense + home = mismatch

DUMPSTER_FIRE.description: NEGATIVE: Bad form + bad offense + injuries = stay away

COLD_TAKE.description: NEGATIVE: No edge found anywhere — below-neutral average across all variables

MISMATCH_MASSACRE.description: Elite offense + solid defense = total mismatch. Rare but high-conviction.

GLASS_CANNON.description: NEGATIVE: Scores a lot but leaks — volatile, reduce confidence

BRICK_WALL.description: NEGATIVE: Can't score. Elite defense but no firepower to capitalize.

REVENGE_GAME.description: Lost H2H badly but now in form + at home = revenge motivation

LETDOWN_ALERT.description: NEGATIVE: On huge streak but no motivation — letdown spot

ROAD_WARRIOR.description: Away team in form with rest edge — road warrior spot

SCHEDULE_LOSS.description: NEGATIVE: B2B + road + bad form = scheduled loss. Stay away.

PITCHING_DUEL.description: Both aces + pitcher park = under play, our SP has edge

DERBY_CHAOS.description: Derby with both teams in form + table stakes — intensity boost

TOURIST_TRAP.description: NEGATIVE: Big club away at tough venue while congested — trap

HUNGRY_DOG.description: Underdog playing hungry — good form, motivated, sharps notice

COASTING_FAV.description: NEGATIVE: Favorite coasting — bad form, no motivation, offense flat

NOTHING_TO_LOSE.description: Bad team at home playing free — upset potential

PUBLIC_TRAP.description: Public hammering one side but line won't move + ATS trend disagrees

BOUNCE_BACK.description: Elite team on cold streak at home — regression to the mean incoming

FADE_THE_STREAK.description: NEGATIVE: Long win streak but away + tired = regression spot

BENCH_MOB.description: Deep bench + healthy rotation + playing well = sustainable edge

THIN_ROSTER.description: NEGATIVE: Key players OUT + no depth = trouble

PLATOON_EDGE.description: Favorable handedness matchup + decent SP + hitter-friendly park

WRONG_SIDE.description: NEGATIVE: Bad platoon matchup vs dominant pitcher = fade
